interaction.image: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/annoyed.png
interaction.dialogue: Damn it! The main elevator is completely smashed. There's no way we can get out of here using this!

interaction.image: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/sad.png
interaction.dialogue: I don't want to sit here at the bottom of a giant hole forever...

interaction.image: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/neutral.png
interaction.dialogue: Actually, there is a maintenance elevator nearby which might still be working. We should be able to get to it through a vent in the nearby guard office.

interaction.image: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/neutral.png
res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/blushing.png
interaction.dialogue: I mean, the maintenance elevator could also be broken, and we would have to fight our way there through soooo many guards, so if you wanted to just...

interaction.image: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/blushing.png
res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png

options.image: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
options.response: Okay! Off we go towards the guards then!

options.dialogue: You're right, it's not worth the risk.
options.image: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/derp.png

interaction.image: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/blushing.png
res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
interaction.dialogue: I would never want to keep you here. Haha.

interaction.image: res://art/GG/rendered date sprite poses/Idle pose/Cottagecore costume/smile.png
